title: ericameria parryi var. affinis
intro: Ericameria parryi var. affinis, also known as Parry's goldenrod or Pinyon bush goldenrod, is a shrubby perennial plant in the daisy family. It has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory, antiseptic, and antibacterial properties, making it a popular choice for treating various health issues. The health benefits of Ericameria parryi var. affinis include reducing fever, relieving sore throats, and treating respiratory issues such as bronchitis and coughs. Herbal preparations of this plant include teas, infusions, and tinctures, which can be used to promote overall well-being and alleviate various health problems.
